siteMetadata.title: TransPool24 – Logistics in Pforzheim, Germany
siteMetadata.description: Haulage company Pforzheim & digital logistics marketplace in Germany. Road freight Baden-Württemberg, courier & forwarding. Book transport online, real-time shipment tracking, freight quotes. Digital logistics with secure Stripe payments. Pforzheim delivery service — TransPool24.

aboutNarrative.metaTitle: About us | TransPool24 — digital logistics from Pforzheim
aboutNarrative.metaDescription: Engineering vision, flexible logistics, and strategic goals in Germany — plus operational detail for B2B shippers.
aboutNarrative.intro1: TransPool24 did not start as “just” a transport booking page. It was born from an engineering vision: to redefine flexible logistics end to end. Our design follows a minimalist-modern philosophy — Prussian blue for calm authority, vibrant orange for momentum — so the product matches both German technology expectations and clarity under operational pressure. This is not decoration: it is a deliberate user journey that turns complex flows into steps you can finish in a few clicks.
aboutNarrative.intro2: Like leading digital logistics platforms worldwide, we build on transparency, automation, and mutual trust between customer and driver — clear status, fewer phone loops, predictable payments.
aboutNarrative.strategicLead: We aim to be the digital artery linking Pforzheim with every federal state, closing time and logistics gaps in road transport through:
aboutNarrative.bulletAutomation: Full automation: from instant pricing to shipment tracking you can rely on.
aboutNarrative.bulletTransparency: Radical transparency: secure global payment systems that protect every party.
aboutNarrative.bulletSocial: Social responsibility: tackling unemployment and building workforce capability.
aboutNarrative.dailyOpsLead: Between booking, pickup and delivery, the process has to work in the real world — not only in a slide deck.
aboutNarrative.dailyOpsB1: Status you can act on: from confirmed booking to delivery, with tracking and proof of delivery where it matters.
aboutNarrative.dailyOpsB2: Pricing and payment: upfront quote and secure Stripe checkout — fewer disputes, predictable cash flow.
aboutNarrative.dailyOpsB3: Pforzheim and nationwide: a network of vetted drivers for B2B freight and commercial moves.
aboutNarrative.csrLead: We are part of Germany’s social fabric. Activating the labour market is a core pillar for TransPool24:
aboutNarrative.csrJobs: Creating jobs: opening the door for drivers and local providers to join a professional, standards-based network.
aboutNarrative.csrUnemployment: Moving past unemployment: technology should serve people — we help onboard and train teams on our digital tools, reducing friction in the labour market and creating sustainable opportunities across Baden-Württemberg and Germany.
aboutNarrative.federalP: As a German-rooted company we aspire to lead on quality and compliance. We move not only goods — we move trust — and help turn traditional logistics into a smarter digital industry. Partners in growth, contributors to stable labour markets, proud to be part of Germany’s logistics future.
aboutNarrative.ctaPrefix: Smarter transport for a clearer future.

blog.metaIndexDescription: Editorial magazine: road transport and logistics in Germany. Land-based services only — news, pricing context, and how to book with TransPool24.

blog.indexNewsDescription: Editorial insights on road freight and logistics in Germany (land transport only) — curated by the TransPool24 team.
blog.empty: No articles yet. Please check back soon.
blog.emptyHintPublic: Articles are published per language. Switch language above or check back later — there is no editor on this public page.
blog.emptyHint: Articles are not written on this public page. Sign in to the operations dashboard, open Blog / Magazin, create a post, set status to Published, and choose the same language as this page (e.g. EN). You can also run the optional SQL seed in Supabase to insert welcome posts for DE and EN.
blog.emptyAdminSteps: Admin login → Blog / Magazin → New article → Published
blog.seedHint: Optional welcome posts for DE & EN:
blog.footerBlurb: Independent editorial content from TransPool24. Booking and services remain on the main website.
blog.footerDisclaimer: Articles are for general information only, not legal or financial advice.

order.title: Book transport order
order.addressPostcodeHint: Enter the German postcode (5 digits), street, and house number yourself. Suggestions appear as you type in the street field.
order.addressOneLineHint: Enter street, house number, and German postcode (5 digits) in one line. Suggestions appear as you type.
order.cargoWeightRequired: Please enter cargo weight in kg (greater than 0).
order.cargoPackagesRequired: Please enter number of parcels/pieces (at least 1).
order.cargoPhotosRequired: Please upload at least one photo of the cargo.
order.cargoDetailsMandatoryHint: Required: weight, number of parcels/pieces, and photos showing size.
order.cargoPhotosHint: Up to {max} photos, max 4 MB each.
order.cargoWhatToTransport: What do you want to transport?
order.driverTimeRequiresAddress: To calculate driver time and hourly billing, enter pickup and delivery addresses in the previous step and click "Calculate real distance".
order.distanceManualHint: Could not calculate automatically — enter distance manually in the next step.
order.priceShowsAfterWeightPackages: Complete all fields below to see the price.
order.priceCompleteAllFieldsHint: The price appears after you select category, service type, cargo details (weight, parcels, photos), load size — and the route distance is calculated. Terrain and weather are applied automatically.
order.pricePreviewFailed: Could not calculate the price. Check addresses and try again.
order.routePricingAutoHint: Times include automatic terrain (Google elevation) and weather adjustment.
order.routeConditionsHint: Terrain and weather affect driving time (speed).
order.routeFactorsRequired: Please select terrain and weather for the route.
order.bookingsPausedBody: We are not accepting new transport requests through the website right now. Please try again later.
order.bookingsPausedShort: Bookings are paused. Please try again later.
order.success: Payment successful. Your order has been recorded.
order.confirmedSuccess: Order confirmed. We will contact you after assigning a driver to complete payment.
order.thankYouMessage: We appreciate your trust. We will contact you shortly to confirm your request.
order.confirmByEmailHint: We will send you an email with a confirmation link. When you click it, payment and driver details will appear.
order.rateUsOnGoogle: Help others by sharing your experience — rate us on Google
order.driverTba: You will receive driver details and arrival time after assignment.
order.confirmMessage: Please verify your details. We will send you a confirmation by email — please wait for us to contact you.
order.confirmCheckboxLabel: I confirm the accuracy of the information above and agree to the processing of this order.
order.trackSubtitle: Status, ETA, and approximate vehicle position when available.
order.trackMissingParams: Please open the full link from your email (includes order ID and security token).
order.trackNoPosition: No live GPS position yet. A map appears when the driver location is updated.
order.trackDriverPending: Your driver will appear here as soon as one is assigned. You can still follow the planned route on the map.
order.trackMapHint: Gray dashed: planned route (pickup → delivery). Orange: live GPS trail. Large round marker: driver photo at the current position. The orange button opens Google Maps zoomed in on that spot for easier live tracking.
order.trackNoGeocode: We could not load the automatic map for these addresses. Open the route in Google Maps instead.

landing.metaDescription: Apply to drive for TransPool24 in Pforzheim and the region. Fair hourly pay and flexible hours.
landing.heroLead: Drive for us – fair hourly pay plus tips.
landing.heroFootnote: * Example: base pay plus job bonuses for full-time shifts.
landing.trackingTeaserBody: On active jobs, drivers can share GPS with dispatch and customers — they see progress and ETA on the booking system.
landing.card1Title: Fair pay: hourly rate plus extras
landing.card1Body: Clear hourly rate, waiting time compensation, and tips.
landing.card2Body: Clear agreements, on-time payments, support when you need it.
landing.card3Body: Full-time or part-time – you choose your hours.
landing.requirementsTitle: What you need to get started
landing.req1Body: Valid ID, driving licence, vehicle insured as required.
landing.req2Body: Work with your own vehicle; mileage is accounted for.
landing.req4Body: Enjoy driving and interacting with customers.
landing.process1: 1. Fill in the form. 2. Prepare documents.
landing.process2: 3. Short interview. 4. If it fits, you receive an offer.
landing.process3: 5. Equipment & schedule. 6. We support you on your first day.
landing.testimonialQuote: “Working with TransPool24 is flexible and clear – especially evenings and weekends.”
landing.faq1q: How old do I need to be to work as a driver?
landing.faq1a: You must be at least 18 and hold a valid driving licence.
landing.faq2a: We work on an hourly basis – depending on distance and loading/unloading time, transparent and traceable.
landing.faq3q: My city is not listed – can I still apply?
landing.faq3a: Yes. Choose “Other” and note your city in the comments – we will get back to you.
landing.faq4q: Do I need my own vehicle?
landing.faq4a: You can work as driver-only, with vehicle, or with vehicle and assistant – depending on the job.
landing.faq5a: After your application we review your details and contact you by email or phone.

driverShare.pageSubtitle: TransPool24 — for assigned drivers only. Your position helps dispatch and the customer ETA.
driverShare.title: GPS sharing
driverShare.intro: Tap the button below and allow location access. We send your position about every 12 seconds while this page stays open.
driverShare.privacyBody: Sharing uses your phone GPS. You can stop anytime. Close the tab or tap Stop sharing.
driverShare.missingParams: This link is incomplete. Ask dispatch for the full link.
driverShare.noGeolocation: This browser does not support location.
driverShare.permissionDenied: Location permission denied. Enable it in browser settings.
driverShare.sendFailed: Could not send position. Check connection.
driverShare.keepOpen: Tip: keep this page open in the foreground during the trip for best updates.
driverShare.navIntro: Opens Google Maps with turn-by-turn directions. Use after you start the trip.
driverShare.routeInfoHint: From the order; traffic may differ.
driverShare.podIntro: After delivery, upload a handover photo. The job is marked delivered automatically and dispatch will see the image.
driverShare.podUploadOk: Proof of delivery saved. Thank you!
driverShare.podNotImage: Please choose an image (JPEG, PNG or WebP).
driverShare.gpsMandatoryShort: Required: Start live location first, then delivery photo. No GPS → no delivery confirmation.
driverShare.gpsMandatoryTitle: Required: Live location for the customer
driverShare.gpsMandatoryBody: Tap the button and allow location access. After at least one successful update, you appear on the customer tracking page and you can upload the delivery photo.
driverShare.gpsOkForCustomer: Location is being sent – customer tracking is active.
driverShare.gpsRequiredBeforePod: Please start location sharing above and wait until a position is sent. Delivery photo is not possible without live GPS.

privacyPolicy.metaDescription: How TransPool24 processes personal data (website, bookings, driver applications) under the GDPR.
privacyPolicy.pageLead: This privacy notice explains, in accordance with Articles 13 and 14 GDPR, how we process personal data when you visit our website, use our online booking for transport services, or apply as a driver.
privacyPolicy.socialIntro: When you visit our social media profiles, platform operators may process personal data (e.g. IP address). Please refer to each provider’s privacy policy:

s1.title: 1. Purpose and scope
s1.p1: TransPool24 provides transport and logistics services focused on Pforzheim and the region. We only process personal data where necessary to operate the website, conclude and perform contracts, comply with legal obligations, or based on your consent.
s1.p2: This notice covers our public website, the booking / order process, communication by email or contact form, and driver applications.
s1.p3: We do not use solely automated decision-making including profiling within the meaning of Art. 22 GDPR.

s2.title: 2. Controller
s2.p1: The controller under GDPR is TransPool24 (see imprint / website for contact). For privacy requests use the email above or our contact form.
s2.p2: Where we use processors (e.g. hosting, payment, email), this is done under Art. 28 GDPR agreements.

s3.title: 3. What data we process?
s3.intro: The table lists typical categories. Depending on your use, some items may not apply.

r1.data: Booking master data: name, company, addresses, phone, email, order details
r1.purpose: Performing the transport, processing the booking, communication

r2.data: Payment data (via Stripe): payment status, limited card metadata — no full card numbers stored by us
r2.legal: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR; Art. 6(1)(c) for tax/legal retention

r3.data: Driver application data: identity, contact, licence, vehicle, ID documents if provided

r4.data: Technical data: IP address, date/time, browser type, server logs where needed
r4.purpose: Secure operation of the site, limited troubleshooting
r4.legal: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest in secure operation)

s3.outro: If drivers share live location, we process location data only as described in the relevant feature and on the stated legal basis.

s4.title: 4. Legal bases
s4.p1: Contract performance (Art. 6(1)(b)): booking and providing the transport service.
s4.p2: Legitimate interests (Art. 6(1)(f)): IT security, fraud prevention, anonymised statistics where your interests do not override.
s4.p3: Consent (Art. 6(1)(a)): only where we ask explicitly — you may withdraw consent for the future.

s5.title: 5. Retention, sharing and transfers
s5.p1: We keep data only as long as needed for the purposes above or as required by law (e.g. commercial/tax retention).
s5.p2: We share data with third parties only if needed for the contract (e.g. payment provider, hosting), we are legally required, or you have consented.
s5.p3: If data is transferred outside the EEA, we rely where required on adequacy decisions or appropriate safeguards under Art. 44 ff. GDPR.

s6.title: 6. Your rights
s6.intro: Subject to legal requirements, you have in particular:
s6.e: Objection to processing based on Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (Art. 21 GDPR)
s6.f: Withdraw consent for the future (Art. 7(3) GDPR)
s6.outro: You may lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority (Art. 77 GDPR).

s7.title: 7. Changes
s7.p1: We update this notice when processing or legal requirements change. The current version is on this page with the “Last updated” date.
s7.p2: Please review it when you use new features.

termsOfUse.metaDescription: Terms governing use of the TransPool24 website and online booking for transport services.
termsOfUse.pageLead: These terms govern your use of our website and our online booking for transport and logistics services, and — where applicable — the contractual relationship between us and business or private customers, unless individual agreements take precedence.
termsOfUse.relatedBody: For how we process personal data, see our privacy policy. Contact us via support if you have questions.

s1.title: 1. Scope
s1.p1: The provider is TransPool24 (“we”). These terms in the version published on the website apply, together with applicable law, in particular the German Civil Code (BGB), where relevant.
s1.p2: We do not accept conflicting or additional customer terms unless we expressly agree in writing.
s1.p3: A “consumer” means any natural person entering into a transaction predominantly for private purposes.

s2.title: 2. Contracting party and description of services
s2.p1: We arrange and/or perform transport and logistics services depending on the specific order, with a focus on Pforzheim and the region. Scope, route, time window and price follow from the booking or checkout flow and any written confirmations.
s2.p2: If third parties (e.g. subcontractors or drivers) assist in performance, we remain — where contractually agreed — your primary contact unless clearly stated otherwise.

s3.title: 3. Offer, booking and contract formation
s3.p1: Website and booking flow content constitutes an invitation for you to make an offer. A contract is formed when we accept your booking or confirm the order, unless the process expressly states otherwise.
s3.p2: You must provide accurate and complete information on cargo, addresses, contact details and special circumstances (e.g. access limits). Later changes may affect price or schedule.
s3.p3: Cancellations and rescheduling follow the rules communicated at booking time and applicable statutory consumer rights where you are a consumer.

s4.title: 4. Prices, payment, payment provider
s4.p1: Prices are in euros unless stated otherwise and include VAT where applicable. Deviations may arise from route, extras, waiting time or special effort.
s4.p2: Card payments may be processed via Stripe; Stripe’s terms apply additionally. Rights of retention exist only for counterclaims from the same contract relationship.

s5.title: 5. Cooperation, cargo, safety
s5.p1: You ensure the cargo matches your declarations, is properly packed and does not violate legal or contractual transport prohibitions.
s5.p2: You must follow reasonable instructions on site relating to safety or proper execution. We may refuse or abort an order in case of grossly negligent or intentional misrepresentation or danger; mandatory consumer law (e.g. § 314 BGB) remains unaffected.

s6.title: 6. Liability
s6.p1: We are fully liable for intent and gross negligence and for injury to life, body or health. For ordinary negligence we are liable only for breach of essential contractual duties; liability is then limited to typically foreseeable damage.
s6.p2: Further liability is excluded to the extent permitted by law, in particular for indirect damage and lost profit unless mandatory law provides otherwise.
s6.p3: The above does not apply where we have assumed a guarantee, or for product liability or fraud.

s7.title: 7. Final provisions
s7.p1: German law applies to the exclusion of the UN Sales Convention, without prejudice to mandatory consumer protection of the country where the consumer habitually resides.
s7.p2: If individual provisions are or become invalid, the remainder stays effective; invalid terms are replaced where possible by a valid provision closest in economic purpose.
s7.p3: We may update these terms. For ongoing contracts, the version effective at contract formation applies unless law requires otherwise.
